evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: FEMALE; min age 18 Years; max age 45 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Participant has ceased lactating or agrees not to provide breastmilk to her infant(s) from just prior to receiving the investigational product (IP) on Day 1 until 7 days after the last dose of IP.~* Participant has had a major depressive episode that began no earlier than the third trimester and no later than the first 4 weeks following delivery, as diagnosed by Structured Clinical Interview for Diagnostic and DSM-5 Clinical Trial Version (SCID-5-CT).~* Participant is ≤12 ...
